description: Redesign Knowledge Lab, Sentence Bank, and Dictionary example lookup into one coherent education-app reference system without changing the Learning Library content schema.

tasks.title: Audit current frontend artifact density and click-path failures
tasks.notes: Current frontend assets contain 11 sources, 3346 sentences, 218 knowledge items, 4 topics, 8 vocab sets, and 5 links. The UI overexposes sparse topic/vocab/link layers while hiding shared_bank sentences behind source-first browsing.

tasks.title: Freeze product IA and route rules for Knowledge Bank, sentence evidence, and dictionary examples
Implement Knowledge Bank focused index and detail navigation cleanup
tasks.notes: Knowledge Bank home now leads with the knowledge catalog, keeps sparse topic/vocab lanes collapsed, and internal Learning Library navigation uses canonical /library routes.

tasks.title: Implement sentence evidence lookup and shared_bank detail support
tasks.notes: Sentence Evidence home is sentence-first, includes source-less/shared_bank sentences when no source filter is active, renders learner-language translations directly, avoids fake source fallbacks, and keeps source browsing secondary/collapsed.

tasks.title: Implement Dictionary example-sentence integration
tasks.notes: Dictionary detail can show related Learning Library example sentences matched by atom id, composite component atom id, surface, or weak sentence-surface fallback.

tasks.title: Add navigation, detail, dark-mode, sparse-content, and dictionary-example smoke tests
tasks.notes: Targeted lookup and home-screen tests updated. Sentence Evidence home now has shared_bank, learner-language translation, UIStrings-backed source-type filter/copy, dark-mode, and route smoke coverage. Sentence Detail now has regression coverage for one-time sentence chunk rendering, inline dictionary detail switching without bottom sheets, and removal of helper/implementation copy. 2026-05-06 Library reference smoke suite passed across Knowledge home, Sentence home/detail/navigation, Dictionary candidate/detail, Video list route, Video repository, and video locale support. Current slice hardened video/dictionary panel UX independently of atom coverage inventory, kept fallback diagnostics out of learner UI, added regression tests for panel stability/missing-meaning behavior, removed AppDatabase drift warning from video dictionary e2e via SRS override, and added explicit dark-mode smoke for Knowledge/Sentence detail surfaces.

tasks.title: Fix Learning Library v2 i18n bridge for grammar explanations and video sentences
tasks.notes: Grammar zh_tw detail exists in explanation_md and is now rendered by the reader. V2 video source i18n now merges existing legacy zh_tw video translations by source id and turn id; synced frontend artifacts verify 1212/1212 translated sentences across the 10 Learning Library video sources.

tasks.title: Prepare content-side follow-up inventory for topic/vocab/link density
tasks.notes: Read-only inventory only. Include whether dictionary should eventually expose stable example_sentence_refs. Do not let Gemini modify frontend code.
